entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS629) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. ADDITION OF ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBER, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3175.01E. 2. ADDITION OF SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS BY NETWORK SITE CODE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3225.01E. 3. ADDITION OF SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS BY NETWORK SITE CODE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3239.01E. 4. ADDITION OF FIFTEEN (15) CISCO SEDS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3263.01E. 5. ADDITION OF TWO (2) CISCO SEDS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3272.01E. 6. CORRECT CLIN FOR DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3275.01S. 7. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 8. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. ADDITION OF ICB PRIVATE LINE SERVICE DOMESTIC TRANSPORT ACCESS PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3192.01E. 2. ADDITION OF CRITICAL ETHERNET 20 MBPS PORT ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3235.01E. 3. ADDITION OF ICB ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3246.01E. 4. ADDITION OF ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBER FOR DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3193.01E. 5. ADDITION OF METRO ETHERNET ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3260.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. ADDITION OF SEVEN (7) SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3288.01E. 2. ADDITION OF ONE (1) WIRELINE SED TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3289.01E. 3. ADDITION OF TWELVE (12) SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3291.01E. 4. ADDITION OF DOMESTIC WIRELINE OC-12 ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3265.02E. 5. ADDITION OF DOMESTIC METRO ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3276.01E.

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. ADDITION OF MNS FOR PLATINUM MES MANAGEMENT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3285.01E. 2. ADDITION OF CSDES ICB PRICING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3292.01E. 3. ADDITION OF SITE SURVEY ICB PRICING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3282.01E. 4. ADDITION OF 5M ETHERNET ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3286.01E. 5. ADDITION OF 600MPBS DEDICATED ETHERNET ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3296.01E.

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS635) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. ADDITION OF CLOUD COMPUTE AS A SERVICE TO DEDICATED HOSTING SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3215.01E. 2. SITE SURVEY, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3283.01E. 3. ADDITION OF MANAGED NETWORK SERVICE - PLATINUM MES MANAGEMENT - ADDS ICB CASE NUMBER AND CLINS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3287.01E. 4. ADDITION OF ICB CUSTOMER SPECIFIC DESIGN ENGINEERING SERVICES PRICING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3293.01E. 5. ADDITION OF ICB CUSTOMER SPECIFIC DESIGN ENGINEERING SERVICES PRICING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3297.01E. 6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 7. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. ADDITION OF ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBER, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3213.01E. 2. CORRECTION OF THE JURISDICTION ID, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3228.01S. 3. CORRECTION OF THE JURISDICTION ID, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3230.01S. 4. ADDITION OF DOMESTIC ETHERNET ACCESS PRICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3208.01E. 5. REDUCTION OF DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS PRICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3220.01P. 6. ADDITION OF THREE (3) CISCO AND US ROBOTIC SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3298.02E. 7. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 8. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS638) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. ADDITION OF ICB CRITICAL BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS 100MBPS CIRCUIT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3261.01E. 2. ADDITION OF FOURTEEN (14) CISCO WIRELINE SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3279.01E. 3. ADDITION OF SIX (6) (3-SAGEMCOM AND 3-SONEXIS) WIRELINE SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3299.01E. 4. ADDITION OF FOURTEEN (14) CISCO AND XIRRUS SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3303.01E. 5. REDUCTION OF PRICES FOR PLATINUM SECONDARY ETHERNET ACCESS AT 10GBPS ALONG WITH PLATINUM SECONDARY PORTS AT 1GBPS AND 10GBPS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3310.01P. 6. PRICE REDUCTION FOR AN MNS FEATURE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3312.01P. 7. ADDITION OF ICB CSDES PRICING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3302.01E. 8. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 9. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

ADDITION OF ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBER, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3221.01E. 2. ADDITION OF ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBER FOR NON-DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3219.01E. 3. ADDITION OF CSDES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3232.01E. 4. PRICE REDUCTION FOR CSDES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3254.01P. 5. ADDITION OF EIGHT (8) SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3304.01E. 6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 7. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ADDITION OF NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3247.02E. 4. ADDITION OF ACCESS DOMESTIC WIRELINE ICB OC-3, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3308.01E. 5. ADDITION OF ICB CUSTOMER SPECIFIC DESIGN ENGINEERING SERVICES PRICING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3300.01E. 6. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.
